services.name: Botox
services.description: Anti-wrinkle injections to smooth fine lines and wrinkles. Results last 3-6 months.
services.downtime: Minimal. Avoid exercise for 24 hours post-treatment.

services.name: Dermal Fillers
services.description: Injectable treatments to add volume, contour, and restore youthful appearance.

services.name: Consultation
services.description: Free initial consultation with our aesthetic practitioners to discuss your goals and suitability.
services.note: All new patients must complete a consultation before treatment.

booking.cancellation_policy: 24-hour notice required for cancellations or rescheduling. Late cancellations may incur a fee.
booking.deposit: A deposit may be required to secure your appointment.
booking.new_patient_note: New patients must book a consultation first before any treatment.

faqs.question: Are treatments painful?
faqs.answer: Most clients experience minimal discomfort. Topical numbing cream is available on request for sensitive areas.

faqs.question: How long do results last?
faqs.answer: Botox results typically last 3-6 months. Filler results vary by area but generally last 6-18 months.

faqs.question: Am I suitable for treatment?
faqs.answer: Suitability is assessed during your free consultation. Treatments are not suitable during pregnancy or breastfeeding.

faqs.question: What should I do before my appointment?
faqs.answer: Avoid alcohol 24 hours before treatment. Come with a clean face (no makeup). Stay hydrated.

escalation_triggers: request to speak to a human

team.note: Our team of qualified aesthetic practitioners has over 10 years of combined experience.

location.note: Exact address provided upon booking confirmation.
